part.text:
Implemented crypto library:

- Created `github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/libs/crypto` package with:
  - `NewDerivedReader` delegating to `kms.NewDerivedReader`.
  - Comprehensive test `TestNewDerivedReader` covering valid and error cases.

- Added minimal dummy type to establish package.
- All imports are automatically resolved by the tool.

The project now compiles with the new crypto package containing the moved functionality.
